artifact.predecessor_phase: Phase 1.2B-A — Service Canonicalization (EXEC-074, closed 2026-04-30, commit e83a2c12)
artifact.successor_slice: Phase 1.2B-C — Contract Expansion (full OpenAPI annotation + route test matrices + DEC-6 shift-intelligence/alerts path birth). Deprecation observability is Phase 1.4, not 1.2B-C.

layer_budget.secondary_layer_constraints: none — no secondary layer receives logic changes
layer_budget.dto_classification: no DTO changes in this slice

scope_guardrail.one_line_boundary: This FIB changes how integer-cents financial values render in start-from-previous.tsx; it does not expand the API contract, add route tests, or wire observability.

adjacent_consequence_ledger.why_adjacent: Contract documentation is a direct consequence of a canonicalized service layer

adjacent_consequence_ledger.temptation: 4-case route-boundary test matrices for recent-sessions and live-view
adjacent_consequence_ledger.why_adjacent: Test coverage improves naturally after the unit is stable

adjacent_consequence_ledger.temptation: DEC-6: GET /api/v1/shift-intelligence/alerts OpenAPI path and route test birth
adjacent_consequence_ledger.why_adjacent: ShiftAlertDTO was promoted in 1.2B-A; surface gap exists

adjacent_consequence_ledger.temptation: Structured log events for deprecated-field usage at route handlers
adjacent_consequence_ledger.why_adjacent: Observability belongs after the stable contract is documented
Integer-cents contract is stable — display component could wrap it
adjacent_consequence_ledger.disposition: Phase 1.3 — component design, theming, accessibility are a distinct phase

stop_conditions: any file other than start-from-previous.tsx requires logic changes
a new test file for start-from-previous.tsx is required
prohibited: formatDollars migration at player-list-panel.tsx:234 (bare number — not a FinancialValue.value field)
OpenAPI path entry creation or modification
structured log events or observability wiring

intent.operator_problem: After Phase 1.2B-A retired BRIDGE-001, FinancialValue.value became integer cents at the service boundary. The start-from-previous panel still calls formatDollars on those values. A pit boss reviewing a prior buy-in of $75 (stored as 7500 cents) now sees $7,500 — off by a factor of 100. This is a display error on the surface a pit boss consults when deciding whether and at what limit to open a new session for a returning player.
intent.pilot_fit: DEF-004 deferred the render migration until integer-cents was confirmed stable at the service boundary. Phase 1.2B-A confirmed that. The bug cannot wait for Phase 1.3 because that phase introduces display components and formatter consolidation, and the pit boss is looking at incorrect dollar amounts right now.
success_outcomes: OUT-1: formatDollars is absent from start-from-previous.tsx for all three FinancialValue.value field reads; formatCents is the formatter at lines 202, 208, and 226
OUT-2: Q-4 consumer audit confirms no other runtime UI formatDollars call site passes a FinancialValue.value integer-cents field
OUT-3: npm run type-check, npm run lint, and npm run build exit 0
OUT-4: DEF-004 closed in ROLLOUT-TRACKER.json with the implementation commit SHA or commit_sha_pending marker plus tracker-only SHA closure before Phase 1.2B-C starts
OUT-5: Phase 1.2B-C can begin against a correct render baseline without rewriting this slice
explicit_exclusions: 4-case route-boundary test matrices for recent-sessions and live-view — Phase 1.2B-C
DEC-6 shift-intelligence/alerts OpenAPI path and route test birth — Phase 1.2B-C
Structured log events for deprecated-field usage — Phase 1.4 or Phase 1.2B-C
start-from-previous.test.tsx / start-from-previous-modal.test.tsx component test birth — Phase 1.3 (DEF-006)
Forbidden-label removal from DOM (Handle, Total Drop, etc.) — Phase 1.3
lib/format.ts and 18+ local formatter variants — consolidation pass Phase 1.3
player-list-panel.tsx:234 formatDollars migration — player.total_net_today is a bare number, not a FinancialValue.value field

adjacent_rejected.idea: Bundle OpenAPI expansion into this slice
adjacent_rejected.why_considered: Contract documentation is a consequence of stable integer-cents unit
adjacent_rejected.why_rejected_now: OpenAPI expansion is Transport/Enforcement — a different change class from Presentation. GOV-FIB-001 §4: secondary classes allowed only in Deferred Work, not MUST.

adjacent_rejected.idea: Bundle 4-case route test matrices into this slice
adjacent_rejected.why_considered: Test coverage improves after unit is stable
adjacent_rejected.why_rejected_now: Enforcement class. The render migration ships and is verified without expanding test matrices. Adding them creates a multi-layer dependency chain around a 3-line UI fix.

adjacent_rejected.idea: Defer the render fix to Phase 1.3 with component birth
adjacent_rejected.why_rejected_now: DEF-004 was deferred only until integer-cents was confirmed stable. A factor-of-100 display error cannot remain through the entire Phase 1.3 UI design cycle.

adjacent_rejected.idea: Migrate formatDollars at player-list-panel.tsx:234 in the same pass
adjacent_rejected.why_considered: File is in the same directory; seems adjacent
adjacent_rejected.why_rejected_now: player.total_net_today is a bare number field — not a FinancialValue.value integer-cents field. Migrating it would change its display semantics, not fix a cents/dollars mismatch.

entities.name: RecentSessionDTO
entities.description: Visit continuation response item whose financial fields carry integer-cents FinancialValue.value after Phase 1.2B-A BRIDGE-001 retirement.

entities.name: start-from-previous render
entities.description: The three financial field renders in start-from-previous.tsx that call formatDollars on FinancialValue.value integer-cents fields. Each must become formatCents.

entities.name: ROLLOUT-TRACKER DEF-004
entities.description: Deferred register entry for the formatDollars to formatCents UI render migration. Closed in this slice with the implementation commit SHA or commit_sha_pending marker plus tracker-only SHA closure before Phase 1.2B-C starts.
fields_hint: DEF-004 commit_sha: <implementation commit> or commit_sha_pending: true until tracker-only SHA closure

relationships: RecentSessionDTO.total_buy_in.value is integer cents after Phase 1.2B-A; start-from-previous.tsx must call formatCents, not formatDollars, to render it correctly.
start-from-previous-modal.tsx and rating-slip-modal.tsx are confirmed clean — they do not read FinancialValue.value fields via formatDollars.
player-list-panel.tsx:234 uses formatDollars on player.total_net_today which is a bare number — it is out of scope for this migration.

capabilities.name: q4-consumer-audit
capabilities.description: Run `rg -n "formatDollars\\([^\\)]*\\.value\\)" app components hooks services lib -S` for runtime UI/service code. Confirm start-from-previous.tsx lines 202/208/226 are the only affected sites before the swap and that the command returns no results after the swap. Confirm start-from-previous-modal.tsx, rating-slip-modal.tsx, and player-list-panel.tsx are clean.

capabilities.name: format-cents-migration
capabilities.description: Replace formatDollars with formatCents at lines 202, 208, and 226 of start-from-previous.tsx. Update the import accordingly.

capabilities.name: tracker-closure
capabilities.description: Close DEF-004 in ROLLOUT-TRACKER.json with the implementation commit SHA or commit_sha_pending marker plus tracker-only SHA closure before Phase 1.2B-C starts.

permissions: replace formatDollars with formatCents at the three named call sites in start-from-previous.tsx
restrictions: may not touch any file other than start-from-previous.tsx for logic changes
may not create new test files
may not add OpenAPI paths or route tests
may not migrate formatDollars at player-list-panel.tsx:234

permissions: close DEF-004 in ROLLOUT-TRACKER.json with commit SHA or commit_sha_pending marker plus tracker-only SHA closure before Phase 1.2B-C starts
restrictions: scope changes require FIB amendment before EXEC-SPEC update

trigger_events.name: phase-1-2b-a-exit-gate-passed
preconditions: FinancialValue.value is integer cents at the service boundary for RecentSessionDTO

trigger_events.name: pit-boss-opens-prior-session-panel
preconditions: player has at least one prior session

lifecycle_events: start-from-previous.tsx formatDollars(FinancialValue.value) incorrect render -> formatCents(FinancialValue.value) correct render
timing_constraints: Phase 1.2B-B may not begin before Phase 1.2B-A exit gate passes
Phase 1.2B-C may not begin before Phase 1.2B-B exit gate passes
Phase 1.3 component work may not begin before Phase 1.2B-B exit gate passes

business_rules.statement: Only start-from-previous.tsx receives logic changes in this slice.
formatDollars must not be used for FinancialValue.value integer-cents fields.
No new test files are birthed in this slice. Component test birth for start-from-previous belongs to Phase 1.3 (DEF-006).
player-list-panel.tsx:234 formatDollars(player.total_net_today) is out of scope. player.total_net_today is a bare number, not a FinancialValue.value field.
No route handler, service, OpenAPI, or test file receives logic changes.
hold_percent must never be wrapped in FinancialValue at any layer in any phase.

invariants: formatCents is the formatter for all FinancialValue.value integer-cents reads in start-from-previous.tsx after this slice.
No runtime UI formatDollars call reads a FinancialValue.value field after Q-4 audit clean.
start-from-previous-modal.tsx, rating-slip-modal.tsx, and player-list-panel.tsx are not modified.
No new test files are created.
No OpenAPI paths, route tests, or observability are introduced.
decision_notes: DEF-004 was deferred from Phase 1.2B-A deliberately: the render migration is only safe after FinancialValue.value is confirmed integer cents at the service boundary. Phase 1.2B-A provided that confirmation.
GOV-FIB-001 §4: secondary change classes (Transport, Enforcement, Observability) are allowed only in Deferred Work, not MUST. All cross-class items are deferred to Phase 1.2B-C.
The Phase 1.2B-A FIB-H §G explicitly listed this render migration as the primary Phase 1.2B-B obligation.

The Q-4 consumer audit was described as an active delivery obligation in the parent FIB-H §G. It is a grep-only discovery step — not a logic change — and is complete when `rg -n "formatDollars\\([^\\)]*\\.value\\)" app components hooks services lib -S` returns no results after the swap.

loop.action: Run `rg -n "formatDollars\\([^\\)]*\\.value\\)" app components hooks services lib -S`. Confirm start-from-previous.tsx lines 202/208/226 are the only affected sites before the swap and that the command returns no results after the swap. Confirm start-from-previous-modal.tsx, rating-slip-modal.tsx, and player-list-panel.tsx are clean.
loop.system_response: Q-4 audit returns clean after the three named call sites are migrated.

loop.action: Update import in start-from-previous.tsx from formatDollars to formatCents.
loop.system_response: TypeScript compiler still resolves the import; same function signature.

loop.action: Replace formatDollars(session.total_buy_in.value) with formatCents(session.total_buy_in.value) at line 202.

loop.system_response: Component renders integer-cents cash out correctly.

loop.action: Replace formatDollars(session.net.value) with formatCents(session.net.value) at line 226.
loop.system_response: Component renders integer-cents net correctly. npm run type-check, lint, and build exit 0.

loop.action: Close DEF-004 in ROLLOUT-TRACKER.json with the implementation commit SHA, or with commit_sha_pending: true followed by tracker-only SHA closure before Phase 1.2B-C starts.
loop.system_response: Governance state records Phase 1.2B-B closure and enables Phase 1.2B-C planning.

required_existing: Phase 1.2B-A exit gate passed on 2026-04-30 (EXEC-074, commit e83a2c12) — FinancialValue.value is integer cents for RecentSessionDTO financial fields
formatCents exists in lib/format.ts and accepts number — same signature as formatDollars
start-from-previous-modal.tsx confirmed clean (no FinancialValue financial field reads)
rating-slip-modal.tsx confirmed clean (no RecentSessionDTO / VisitLiveViewDTO field reads)
player-list-panel.tsx:234 confirmed out of scope (bare number, not FinancialValue.value)
missing_dependencies: EXEC-SPEC for Phase 1.2B-B not yet scaffolded at FIB-S generation time

Implementation commit SHA unknown until execution; if tracker closure lands in the implementation commit, ROLLOUT-TRACKER.json must use commit_sha_pending: true and receive a tracker-only SHA closure before Phase 1.2B-C starts
assumptions: formatCents(n: number): string produces the correct whole-dollar representation for integer-cents inputs under the existing formatter contract without additional configuration.
No route handler or service logic needs to change to support the render correction.
The Q-4 audit will return clean — the context-gathering session already confirmed start-from-previous-modal.tsx and rating-slip-modal.tsx have no FinancialValue.value reads.

outcomes.statement: formatDollars is absent from start-from-previous.tsx for all three FinancialValue.value field reads; formatCents is the formatter at lines 202, 208, and 226.
Q-4 consumer audit confirms no other runtime UI formatDollars call site passes a FinancialValue.value integer-cents field.
npm run type-check, npm run lint, and npm run build exit 0.
DEF-004 closed in ROLLOUT-TRACKER.json with the implementation commit SHA or commit_sha_pending marker plus tracker-only SHA closure before Phase 1.2B-C starts.
Phase 1.2B-C can begin against a correct render baseline without rewriting this slice.

governance.successor_fib_required: Phase 1.2B-C — Contract Expansion (full 28-route OpenAPI + 4-case route test matrices + DEC-6 + deprecation observability)
